original_snippet_context: Discussing the context of the Convênio de Taubaté and its relation to exchange rate stabilization.
relevant_quote: conselheiro Penna, muito do Co sio de Taubaté, declarára partidario da estabilisação do cambio
justification: This mentions Penna's support for exchange stabilization within the context of the Convênio de Taubaté, which included the Caixa de Conversão, but doesn't explicitly endorse a specific rate or broader monetary policy (Orthodox or Expansionist).
